creator: gregoryd.freebsd@free.fr
text:
Lacking spaces between switch and option, in three lines out of six, in file:
/usr/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/printing/chapter.sgml
It's not consistent (either put a space, or none, but on every line).
Besides, adding a space make it easier/prettier to read.

Fix: Apply patch (attached below)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Read it...
